title: BEM-852 backlog retry
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/backlog','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:10 (UTC+3)'
source='governance/protocols/BEM850_AGREED_PROTOCOL_FROM_CLAUDE.md'
items=[['BEM-852.1','P0','Freeze protocol source','Use BEM850 as source of truth'],['BEM-852.2','P0','Keep proof triad gate','Require dispatch result, Claude runtime, real Claude response'],['BEM-852.3','P0','Queue JSON guard','Malformed queue JSON must not fail runner'],['BEM-852.4','P0','Claude response marker','Require CLAUDE RESPONSE and Decision line'],['BEM-852.5','P1','Human protocol table','Make readable implementation table']]
md=Path('governance/backlog/bem852_protocol_implementation_backlog.md')
lines=['# BEM-852 | Protocol Implementation Backlog','','Дата: '+created,'Source: `'+source+'`','','| ID | Priority | Title | Description |','|---|---|---|---|']
for it in items:
    lines.append('| '+it[0]+' | '+it[1]+' | '+it[2]+' | '+it[3]+' |')
md.write_text(sep.join(lines)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-852','status':'implementation_backlog_created','source':source,'items_count':len(items),'next_action':'start BEM-852.1 and BEM-852.2','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem852_protocol_backlog_retry.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem852_protocol_backlog_retry.md').write_text('# BEM-852 | Backlog Retry | CREATED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md').write_text('Next: start BEM-852.1 source freeze and BEM-852.2 proof triad gate. Operator relay forbidden. Reports do not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-852'+sep+sep+'Status: implementation_backlog_created'+sep+'Next: start BEM-852.1 and BEM-852.2'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(md),'governance/state/bem852_protocol_backlog_retry.json','governance/reports/bem852_protocol_backlog_retry.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Created implementation backlog from BEM850 agreed Claude protocol')
"""
